testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/enterprise')' Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/pricing Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 15000ms 4 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/" 14 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/pricing"

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_04

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_04

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/enterprise')' Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/pricing Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 4 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/compare" 5 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/pricing"

testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_02

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_05

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/contact-sales')' Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 15000ms 4 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/contact" 14 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/"
